item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:art","verdict":"REPAIR","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":false,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering ties the maker’s purpose only to seeing and requires frequent good feeling, excluding auditory-only and disturbing art; encode a see-or-hear purpose and remove the GOOD restriction."}
